meta.title: HeroQuest — Browser Dungeon Crawler
meta.description: A multiplayer browser dungeon crawler inspired by the HeroQuest board game.

hero.title: HeroQuest
hero.tagline: Brave the dungeon. Defeat the Warlock. Claim glory.

heroes.title: Choose Your Hero
heroes.subtitle: Four champions stand ready to face the darkness.

barbarian.name: Barbarian
barbarian.description: Raw power and unyielding strength. Deals devastating blows but wears no armour.

dwarf.name: Dwarf
dwarf.description: Sturdy and reliable. Disarms traps and withstands punishment.

elf.name: Elf
elf.description: Swift and precise. Masters both sword and sorcery.

wizard.name: Wizard
wizard.description: Keeper of arcane secrets. Unleashes powerful spells upon the enemy.

howToPlay.title: How to Play
howToPlay.subtitle: A dungeon awaits — three steps to adventure.

lobby.title: Create a Lobby
lobby.description: Start a game and share the link with up to 4 friends. One becomes the Warlock Master.

hero.title: Pick Your Hero
hero.description: Choose from Barbarian, Dwarf, Elf, or Wizard — each with unique stats and abilities.

quest.title: Explore & Conquer
quest.description: Navigate rooms, fight monsters, find treasures. Complete quests to win.

sessions.title: Open Lobbies
sessions.subtitle: Join an adventure already in progress.

footer.tagline: Inspired by the HeroQuest board game.

auth.checkEmailMessage: A verification link has been sent to {email}.
auth.checkSpam: If you don't see it, check your spam folder.
auth.emailVerified: Your email is verified! You can now log in.
auth.forgotPasswordHint: Enter your email address and we'll send you a reset link.
auth.forgotPasswordSent: If that address is registered, a reset link is on its way.

errors.PASSWORD_TOO_SHORT: Password must be at least 8 characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_LENGTH: Hero name must be between 2 and 24 characters.
errors.USERNAME_INVALID_CHARS: Hero name may only contain letters, numbers, spaces, hyphens, and underscores.
errors.USERNAME_TAKEN: That hero name is already taken.
errors.EMAIL_ALREADY_USED: An account with this email already exists.
errors.EMAIL_NOT_VERIFIED: Please verify your email before logging in.
errors.TOKEN_EXPIRED: This link has expired. Please register again.
errors.INVALID_OR_EXPIRED_TOKEN: This link is invalid or has expired.
errors.UNKNOWN: Something went wrong. Please try again.
